description: Xoto partners with leading banks and institutions so you get access to exclusive mortgage offers — faster, easier, and with full transparency.

aiOffers.title: AI Matched Offers
aiOffers.text: We match you to mortgage plans suited to your income, property, and goals.

guidance.title: Personal Guidance
guidance.text: Our mortgage experts help guide you through every step, including paperwork.

transparentCost.title: Transparent Cost
transparentCost.text: All fees, interest, and charges are shown upfront — no last-minute surprises.
